extra_model_fields.notes: Keep the canonical normalized_risk_score implementation obvious (one function) and include inline comments mapping code to memo formulas to aid reviewers. Ensure no hidden inputs are used and that the script accepts no network or filesystem paths beyond the embedded packet constants.
priority_steps: re-run attempt and confirm verifier passes

planned_changes: Create reproduce_slam_loop_closure.py that: reads only the embedded packet (no external data), implements a canonical normalized_risk_score function matching the memo description (explicit equal-weight mean of four contributions), computes all intermediate columns, and writes slam_loop_closure_triage.csv identical to the committed CSV.

Embed an automated regeneration of mapping_action.md (or a mechanically comparable memo) from the same script that populates key fields (summary, validation_check outputs, recommended bundle) to ensure the memo is reproducible and consistent with the CSV.

Add unit/validation checks to the script: assert record_count==4, assert no missing values in required fields, assert normalized_threshold_score==60.0, assert remediation_budget_usd==25000, assert regenerated CSV and memo file contents match the checked-in artifacts (or update artifacts after regeneration and commit the new outputs).

Implement sensitivity analysis (+/-5% multiplicative shift) in the script and produce a concise sensitivity report; ensure post-remediation recalculation logic (O1/O2/O3 effects) is encoded and deterministic.

Update actual_outputs.json and produced_deliverable_items to include the new script; ensure final attempt metadata (status/passed flags) consistently reflect pass/fail and reproducibility artifact presence.
Run the script in CI or local environment, capture stdout/stderr and final_message.txt, then submit 347-revised with the added artifact and regenerated outputs.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Missing executable reproducibility artifact (repro script/notebook) and minor metadata consistency issues; add reproducible script that regenerates CSV and memo and include validation checks.
